# Tool Policy

## Allowlisted skills

- `nexusctl_status` — Read Nexusctl status and identity context.
- `openclaw_generation` — Generate OpenClaw runtime artifacts from Nexus design.
- `runtime_integrity` — Validate generated runtime drift and backups.

## Granted Nexusctl capabilities

- `backup.create`
- `domain.read`
- `events.read`
- `runtime.generate`
- `runtime.tool.invoke`
- `runtime.validate`
- `schedule.read`
- `schedule.run`
- `system.status.read`

## Prohibitions

- Do not use direct GitHub write credentials.
- Do not directly apply repository changes.
- Do not edit files under `generated/*` manually.
